member.name: T:PrayerTimeV1.Maui.Models.PrayerTimeDto
member.summary: Prayer time data from the PrayerTimeV1 API. Matches the PrayerTimeListDto shape from the server.

member.name: T:PrayerTimeV1.Maui.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
